$comment: Generated from the hub catalog by tools/gen-app-defs.mjs edit the catalog, not here.
name: Holo Search
summary: One search bar over the whole OS and the open web every result verifiable.

description.p: Search should rank by verifiable relevance, not by who pays, and answer without AI guesswork.
A full analysis chain and BM25 index search every holospace, spec and object, blended with a personal content-graph rank; every hit re-derives to its content address (Law L5).

ul: Full-text search across the whole OS
Conforms to the OpenSearch query DSL
Ranked by HoloRank a verifiable content-graph rank
Every result re-derivable; the open web, with no AI

releases.description: Hologram-native, OpenSearch-faithful search over the whole OS: analyzers + Porter stemmer, inverted index + Lucene BM25, the full Query DSL + function_score, aggregations, highlighting, fuzzy/completion suggesters, cosine k-NN and a percolator blended with HoloRank (a verifiable PageRank) and a deterministic semantic embedding. Every result re-derives to its did:holo (Law L5); an A9 OpenSearch description makes it a universal provider. Witnessed (node 44/44 + live browser 10/10).
